definitions.text: det at to eller flere uheldige forhold, symptomer eller lignende forverrer hverandre
definitions.translation: the fact that two or more unfortunate circumstances or symptoms worsen each other

examples.no: manglende tilbud førte de unge inn i en ond sirkel
examples.en: the lack of opportunities led the young people into a vicious circle

examples.no: du må bryte den vonde sirkelen
examples.en: you have to break the vicious circle
